text: {"claims":[{"statement":"The University of Lagos vice chancellor gave an update on convocation as the university is set to graduate 8,000 students.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[\"Unilag VC gives update on convocation as varsity set to graduate 8,000 students\"](https://www.legit.ng/1226103-unilag-graduate-8000-students.html).","entailment":"The quoted title states that the VC gave an update and that the university will graduate 8,000 students, directly supporting the claim.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Stroke rates are rising in Nigeria and projections suggest an epidemic in years to come.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[\"Stroke rates are rising in Nigeria, projections suggest an epidemic in years to come - Ovbiagele\"](https://businessday.ng/interview/article/stroke-rates-are-rising-in-nigeria-projections-suggest-an-epidemic-in-years-to-come-ovbiagele/).","entailment":"The quoted article title reports that stroke rates are increasing and that future projections indicate an epidemic, which matches the claim.","population":"Nigeria","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"stroke rates rising","timeframe":"years to come","quantifiers":"","modality":"associational"},{"statement":"Osinbajo listed illustrious citizens who attended the University of Lagos.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"[\"Osinbajo lists illustrious citizens who attended UNILAG\"](https://www.pmnewsnigeria.com/2019/10/27/osinbajo-lists-illustrious-citizens-who-attended-unilag/).","entailment":"The quoted title indicates that Osinbajo listed notable individuals who are alumni of UNILAG, directly supporting the statement.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"}]}
